title: Add footer credit for student developer Omar García Arias

requirements.text: Add a credit line at the end of the page (in the Footer component) stating that the website was made by a student from COBAD 35 named Omar García Arias. The text should read: 'Página creada por Omar García Arias, alumno del COBAD 35' or similar. Style it consistently with the existing footer design using the burgundy and white color scheme.

quotes: Al final ponle que la página fue echa por un alumno de el cobad número 35 ya mando OMAR GARCÍA ARIAS

acceptanceCriteria: Footer component displays a credit line mentioning Omar García Arias as a COBAD 35 student
Credit text is styled consistently with the existing burgundy/white theme
Credit appears at the bottom of the page in an appropriate position within the Footer component

constraints: Do not modify the existing footer structure significantly, only add the student credit
Maintain the burgundy and white color scheme established throughout the site
nonGoals: Adding additional contact information or links
Changing the existing copyright or attribution structure
